prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-AIRPORTCARSET-50PC Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 50pc Diecast Toy Cars SPACE Airport Galactic Playset with Floor Mat, Multicolor, Boys Description: Calling all little pilots in training. The Kidplokio 50pc Diecast Toy Cars City Travel Airport Playset with Floor Mat for kids comes with 50 different airplane toy and diecast toy cars and toy trucks to play with, plus an awesome floor mat. The diecast toy cars urban city travel airport playset has everything from big rig trucks, sprint race cars, and a variety of aircraft from commuter aircraft to military fighter jets and more.

Designed with small hands in mind, these diecast toy cars are excellent models for little ones to develop their fine motor skills, dexterity and hand eye coordination; and, not only are the toy cars great for kids physical development, the toys for boys playset will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay and pretend play too. Children's imaginations will race, as they create their own construction sites, city driving adventures, refuel with gas, prepare for landing and more. The 50pc airport diecast toy cars playset from Kidplokio also comes with a 21 x 26 inch floor mat, so kids can maneuver the airplane toy and diecast cars from one terminal to the next. Offering an abundance of toy cars to play with, hours of air traffic direction and airplane rescue missions pretend play and cosplay await. Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast toy cars are lightweight and easy to tote from one place to the next, without too much extra added weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have your little one’s imagination soaring, whether at home or on the go. Made from safe, high quality materials, so parents need not worry. A great value playset that kids can use in conjunction with other toys too. Let the flying begin.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys kids toys Christmas gifts Hanukkah gift car accessories learning and education toys airport terminal playroom stocking stuffer jets semi truck toy pretend play cosplay airplane toy fine motor toys brother gifts Features: - 50PC SPACE AIRPORT DIECAST TOY CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little pilots in training! The Kidplokio 50pc Airport Diecast Toy Cars Playset for kids comes with 50 different airport themed toy cars and toy trucks to choose from, plus an awesome play floor mat for hours of air traffic control pretend play! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy airport! Whether it's directing traffic, unloading supplies, preparing for take off or flying fighter jets, this airport toy diecast toy cars playset the will have little ones imaginations soaring - FUN SPACE THEMED FLOOR MAT: The airport themed diecast toy cars playset comes with a 21 x 26 inch city map, so little ones can drive all the different toy cars and toy trucks from terminal to terminal! Great to use with other toys and toy cars too! - FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: Designed with small hands in mind, these toy cars are excellent for little ones to develop fine motor skills and hand eye coordination; and, not only are handling and playing with the toy cars great for their physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 20 x 14 x 1.5 inches; Color: Multicolor; Material: Plastic, Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
